body:
Last fix to #1455.

Gets us to over 4 SYPD on a single GPU (https://buildkite.com/clima/climaatmos-target-gpu-simulations/builds/85#018ae2cc-8cef-4c77-a9d9-dc444f05645d)

title: Inlining and threading of regular broadcasting

body: This PR spreads the use of `Spaces.horizontal_space`. This is a peel off from #1136.
title: Access horizontal space consistently
